disambiguated.context: At the computer store the other day, I overheard a conversation between an Eritrean guy and a Bangladeshi guy. The Eritrean guy was behind the counter trying to explain to the Bangladeshi guy how to just find the power switch on his computer!
disambiguated.question: Who has never used a computer?
